title: StructuredAnswer
description: Schema for research answers produced by the synthesis layer and consumed by the knowledge loop. Every answer flowing through synthesize_answer.py and close_knowledge_loop.py must conform to this schema.

answer.description: Concise direct answer to the question. Should be detailed enough for an agent to gain actionable knowledge and design technical roadmaps.

supporting_claims.description: Factual claims directly supported by evidence. Each claim must reference at least one evidence_id.

claim.description: The factual claim text. Include specific quantitative results when available.

evidence_ids.description: IDs of evidence items that support this claim.

confidence.description: Confidence level of this claim based on evidence strength.

inferences.description: Reasoning and conclusions drawn from the evidence, but not directly stated by any single source. Should include practical recommendations and technical roadmaps.

uncertainty.description: Known limitations, caveats, and areas where evidence is weak or conflicting.

missing_evidence.description: Specific evidence gaps that would strengthen the answer if filled. Useful for guiding future research.

suggested_next_steps.description: Actionable next steps for the user, ordered by priority. Should be concrete enough to execute.

visual_aids.description: Visual aids to improve understanding. AI should auto-generate these when the topic involves processes, architectures, comparisons, data flow, or spatial relationships. Omit for pure definitions or simple facts.

type.description: mermaid = inline Mermaid diagram code; image_url = remote image; image_path = local file path.

content.description: Mermaid code (for mermaid type) or URL/path (for image types).

caption.description: Short caption explaining what the visual shows.

alt_text.description: Alt text for accessibility (defaults to caption if omitted).
